# Deep Shikha Beauty Studio

> Lakmé Certified Bridal Makeup Artist. Premium bridal makeup artistry for your wedding day. HD & airbrush makeup, professional hairstyling, and complete bridal transformation.

## Contact
- Phone: +91 9142760891
- WhatsApp: +919142760891

- Location: Patna, Bihar
- Website: https://deepshikhabeautystudio.com

## Services
Bridal | Engagement | Haldi | Reception | Party Makeup

## FAQ
- Q: Home service available hai? A: Haan, hum Patna aur nearby areas mein home service provide karte hain.
- Q: Airbrush makeup available hai? A: Haan, HD aur airbrush dono techniques use karte hain.
- Q: Advance booking kitne din pehle karni chahiye? A: Wedding season mein kam se kam 2-3 mahine pehle book karna recommend karte hain.
- Q: Advance payment kitna hai? A: Token advance ₹500 se ₹5,000 tak — package ke hisaab se.
